---
title: "대시보드 제목"
author: "작성자"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY년 MM월 DD일"
---

## Row {height=30%}

### Column

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "총 방문자"
dict(
  value = "12,345",
  icon = "people",
  color = "primary"
)
```

### Column

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "전환율"
dict(
  value = "3.2%",
  icon = "graph-up",
  color = "success"
)
```

### Column

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "평균 체류시간"
dict(
  value = "4분 32초",
  icon = "clock",
  color = "info"
)
```

## Row {height=70%}

### Column {width=60%}

```{python}
#| title: "월별 트렌드"
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib
matplotlib.rcParams['font.family'] = 'AppleGothic'

months = ['1월', '2월', '3월', '4월', '5월', '6월']
values = [120, 150, 180, 220, 280, 350]

fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.plot(months, values, marker='o', color='#4F46E5', linewidth=2)
ax.fill_between(range(len(months)), values, alpha=0.1, color='#4F46E5')
ax.set_ylabel('방문자 수')
ax.spines[['top', 'right']].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

### Column {width=40%}

```{python}
#| title: "카테고리별 분포"
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

labels = ['기술', '디자인', '마케팅', '기타']
sizes = [40, 25, 20, 15]
colors = ['#4F46E5', '#10B981', '#F59E0B', '#A3A3A3']

fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.pie(sizes, labels=labels, colors=colors, autopct='%1.0f%%', startangle=90)
ax.axis('equal')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```
